problem.statement: Monthly reporting repeats manual collection, validation, and approval work across stable spreadsheets and ERP exports, but security and authority boundaries require enablement before full G1 design.

scope: Map validation rules and known exceptions

user_flow.action: Collect ERP export and spreadsheet inputs
user_flow.output: Input evidence bundle ready for review

user_flow.action: Check mapped rules and unresolved exceptions
user_flow.output: Exception list and rule coverage summary

user_flow.action: Approve whether the package can proceed to G1 design

assumptions: M5 only drafts a design package and does not read production systems.
Any real data access requires a later approval boundary.

system_assumptions: ERP access boundary is unresolved and must remain a blocker before implementation.
Spreadsheet structure is stable enough to standardize input naming.
No external workflow is executed by this package.

retained_responsibilities: Approve any action that affects external systems
Keep final decision authority with the user
approval_points: Before any pilot uses real business data
Before recommendations are applied to production work
exception_handling: Route known exceptions to manual review

risks_and_controls.risk: The work model may still omit edge cases or control points.
risks_and_controls.control: Require playback confirmation and readiness review before G1 design.

risks_and_controls.risk: Security or authority exposure may exist around ERP access.
risks_and_controls.control: Keep external execution and credential collection out of M5 scope.

acceptance_tests.given: A generated monthly report design package
The package is reviewed by a user
acceptance_tests.when: The user inspects the backlog and non-goals
acceptance_tests.then: No step requests credentials, code generation, or external system execution

implementation_backlog.title: Standardize source inputs
implementation_backlog.description: Define required ERP export and workbook naming before any G1 design.

implementation_backlog.title: Resolve ERP access boundary
implementation_backlog.description: Clarify whether later pilots can use API, file export, or manual upload only.

open_questions: Collect evidence for ERP API access boundary
Clarify human approval and authority boundary
